items.title: OPTIC-K voicing search
items.rationale: Production voicing-search index consumed by ga (optick.index); the highest-traffic ix↔ga contract.

items.title: Demerzel governance
items.rationale: Constitution + personas govern all agent actions ecosystem-wide; impact high but adoption/usage unmeasured.

items.title: ix-agent MCP server
items.rationale: Exposes ix algorithms as MCP tools to the federation; broad reach, no per-tool usage telemetry yet.

items.title: Streeling learnings catalog
items.rationale: Shipped + drift-gated; backs the learnings-researcher. Confirmed live, modest reach.

items.title: DuckDB chatbot flight recorder
items.rationale: Just shipped; makes chatbot regressions answerable. Value reasoned, adoption not yet observed.

repo_score.rationale: Foundational ML + governance crates underpinning the ecosystem; impact high, but most surfaces lack usage telemetry (confidence capped).
